setup_hint.not_configured: Tunnel not configured. Go to the "Configuration" tab to set up.

public.title: Public Node
public.desc: One-click enable, no domain or CF account needed. Access via ComfyCarry shared tunnel service.

custom.title: Custom Tunnel
custom.desc: Use your own Cloudflare account, API token, and domain for full control.

config.subdomain_help: Leave subdomain prefix empty for random generation. Public mode uses erocraft.org, custom mode uses your own domain.
config.protocol_help: Cloudflared transport protocol. QUIC may be unstable, HTTP/2 recommended.
config.cf_token_help: Requires Tunnel Edit + DNS Edit permissions
config.subdomain_error: Subdomain format error: 3-32 chars, lowercase letters, numbers or hyphens
config.public_hint_active: Public node enabled · Check service links in the "Service & Logs" tab.
config.public_hint_inactive: Public mode requires no domain or CF account. Click "Save" to enable. Custom subdomain prefix optional.
config.custom_hint_active: Custom Tunnel running · Click "Save" after changes to update and restart.
config.custom_hint_inactive: Enter CF API Token and domain, then click "Save" to auto-create Tunnel, configure DNS and Ingress.

confirm.fill_token_domain: Please fill in API Token and domain
confirm.create_tunnel:
Create Cloudflare Tunnel?

DNS and Ingress will be configured automatically.
confirm.remove_tunnel:
Remove Cloudflare Tunnel?

Tunnel and DNS records will be deleted, and cloudflared will be stopped.
confirm.config_saved_restart:
Configuration saved. Restart cloudflared to apply.

Restart now?
confirm.config_saved_next: Configuration saved, will take effect on next start
confirm.destroy_to_public:
Switch to public mode?

The custom Tunnel will be destroyed.
confirm.switch_to_custom:
Switch to custom Tunnel?

The public node will be disabled.
confirm.update_restart:
This will update the Tunnel configuration and restart cloudflared.

Connections through the Tunnel may briefly disconnect. Continue?
confirm.disable_public:
Disable public node?

The Tunnel will be deleted and all public links will stop working.
confirm.stop_cloudflared:
Stop cloudflared?

All connections through the Tunnel will be disconnected.
confirm.restart_cloudflared:
Restart cloudflared?

Connections may be briefly interrupted.
